title: Bolt Schema
description: A bolt is the torque-certification fastened through a CLOSED pattern: it certifies that every item in the pattern (each a lug) was verified non-hallucinated. It is the realized join of WHO (session) did WHAT (lugs) toward WHICH initiative (WHEN), proven. Emitted at savepoint OR closeout when a pattern closes. certified = every item passed; partial = closed early with items still unverified (records what remains so the next worker resumes from proof). Bolts are durable, immutable, never consumed; a session's bolts = its activity log, an initiative's = its journey, the chain of provenance = the versioned DNA.

pattern_id.description: The pattern (contract) this bolt certifies; null only for legacy/freeform bolts

pattern_version.description: semver of the pattern at certification

certification_status.description: certified = every pattern item passed; partial = pattern closed early with unverified/remaining items

items.description: Per-item certification record — the non-hallucination proof for each lug in the pattern

verified_by.description: assertion id / verifier agent id / human

provenance.description: Carried forward from the certified pattern — the DNA lineage node

kind.description: work = a pattern certification (pattern_id set); freeform = session with no pattern/initiative (legacy); ceremony = certifies a closeout/savepoint ceremony's steps actually ran + passed (pattern_id null, items[] are step records); adoption = certifies a base-harness install/migrate completed + verified (pattern_id null, items[] are component checks); gate-certification = certifies a Pattern-Gate disposition (approved/halted/escalate) on a flow (pattern_id null, items[] are gate checks, ties certification|halt|escalation events to the bolt substrate — AC13)

status.description: Bolts are born final (recorded). superseded only when corrected by a later bolt.

session_id.description: The session (WHO) that produced this bolt

initiative_id.description: The initiative (WHEN/grouping) this advanced; null only when kind=freeform

lug_ids.description: Lugs (WHAT) completed or advanced this session under this initiative; may be empty

what_was_done.description: Backward-looking achievement summary (reuses the session work_done summary)

git_sha.description: HEAD at emit (8-char ok) — permanent evidence

sequence.description: Ordering info — the navigable treasure map

session_number.description: The spoke session counter at emit

prior_bolt_id.description: Previous bolt for THIS initiative (linked list within initiative) — walk to read the initiative's journey

sibling_bolt_ids.description: Other bolts emitted by THIS session (the multi-initiative case)

themes.description: Health dimensions advanced (denormalized from completed lugs)

celebration.description: true if this bolt culminated its initiative (Ozi celebrated)

session_track_ref.description: Path to sessions/{session_id}/track.jsonl for fine-grained drill-down

supersedes.description: Set only when correcting a prior bolt
